sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.rendered_content:
AMG closes 2025-12-31 with $2.07B of revenue (1.6% YoY) and $717M of net income (40.1% YoY). The net margin of 34.5% is the clearest guide to how much of reported revenue reached the bottom line. Revenue and earnings improved together, indicating that the growth story carried through to reported profitability.

Operating cash flow reached $973M (4.4% YoY), and after $6.1M of capital spending the business produced $967M of free cash flow (4.1% YoY). Cash generation exceeded reported earnings, a sign that the period converted accounting profit into liquidity with relatively little friction. Capital spending absorbed 0.3% of revenue, which helps frame how much internal cash flow remained available after reinvestment.

sections.title: Trend Analysis
sections.rendered_content:
Across the annual periods shown here, Free Cash Flow provides the clearest recurring pattern, with the latest value at $967M and a compound annual growth rate of 4.8%. The multi-year trend is positive, but the pace is moderate rather than transformative.

The multi-year trajectory has been broadly stable without a strong directional shift. Cash generation remained constructive, with $973M of operating cash flow translating into $967M of free cash flow.

sections.title: Risk Factors
sections.rendered_content: The most important risks in the current numbers are concentrated in the areas where profitability, cash generation, or balance-sheet support are not moving together. Reported pretax income of $1.19B does not line up cleanly with net income and tax expense, so the tax bridge should be interpreted with caution.

sections.title: Analyst Notes
sections.rendered_content:
The most constructive part of AMG's profile is straightforward: ROE of 16.9% points to solid earnings generation relative to book equity.

This note is anchored to the annual period ending 2025-12-31, with the prior period set at 2024-12-31. Metrics without the required statement support remain blank rather than estimated, so the analysis stays tied to the filing evidence rather than to gap-filled assumptions.
